narration: Misfolded proteins that can make more misfolded proteins.
visual_description: Hook visual: Misfolded proteins that can make more misfolded proteins.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Misfolded proteins that can make more misfolded proteins.

narration: These proteins, called prions, are rare but can lead to serious diseases.
visual_description: Context visual: These proteins, called prions, are rare but can lead to serious diseases.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: These proteins, called prions, are rare but can lead to serious diseases.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: These proteins, called prions, are rare but can lead to serious diseases.

narration: They cause neurodegeneration, impacting the brain’s function.
visual_description: Escalation visual: They cause neurodegeneration, impacting the brain’s function.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: They cause neurodegeneration, impacting the brain’s function.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: They cause neurodegeneration, impacting the brain’s function.

narration: Infections can occur through contaminated food or surgical instruments.

ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Infections can occur through contaminated food or surgical instruments.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Infections can occur through contaminated food or surgical instruments.

narration: But don’t panic—research is ongoing, and many cases are preventable.
